case_title: YUAN CHEN VS. BRIDGET R. LEBLANC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YUAN AS TO DEFENDANT LEBLANC, BRIDGET R. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA LEBLANC AND ASSOCIATES J'LA CHIC & ASSOCIATES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CHEN, YUAN
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, YUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEBLANC, BRIDGET R. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA LEBLANC AND ASSOCIATES J'LA CHIC & ASSOCIATES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY $1,055.33 PRINCIPAL, $.16 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,235.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
